stem: Write a Boolean expression for P so that P is TRUE when A and B are both TRUE, or when C is FALSE.
model_answer: P = (A AND B) OR NOT C. Symbol forms are accepted: (A.B)+/C or (A∧B)∨¬C etc.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Write the Boolean expression for P.

mark_points.text: Expression matches one of the accepted forms
